scripts.compile: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('.dist', { recursive: true, force: true })" && tsc -p ./tsconfig.json --outDir ./.dist
scripts.deploy: npm run build && NPM_CONFIG_REGISTRY=http://bnpm.byted.org npm exec -y @bytedance-dev/bytedcli@latest -- goofy preview deploy site --alias bytedcli --override
